borders.value: 0px 0px 1px none none solid rgb(0, 0, 0) rgb(0, 0, 0) rgb(102, 102, 102)

rules.cssText: .div-block-8 { z-index: 99; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-end; height: 100%; padding: 19px; display: flex; position: absolute; inset: 0%; }

.div-block-9 { backdrop-filter: blur(40px); background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); border-radius: 20px; justify-content: center; align-items: center; padding: 5px 10px; display: flex; }
._24-marcas-name { z-index: 99; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-end; height: 100%; padding: 19px; display: flex; position: absolute; inset: 0%; }

._24-marcas-name-wrapper-infos { backdrop-filter: blur(40px); background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); border-radius: 20px; justify-content: center; align-items: center; padding: 5px 10px; display: flex; }
.footer { background-image: none; background-position: 0px 0px; background-repeat: repeat; background-size: auto; }
.arguments-section_wrapper { gap: 2rem; flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; }
.method_detail-textbox { text-align: center; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; width: 50%; }
.method_bottom-wrapper { gap: 1rem; flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; }
.method-slide_bottom { gap: 1rem; flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; }
.method-description_item { gap: 1rem; flex-flow: column; grid-template-rows: auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; display: flex; }
.experience_wrapper { flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; }
.site_header-info { gap: 1rem; flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; }
.sobre-customizable_title { flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; }
._26-footer_content { flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; }
._23-round-box.four-sides._1.g-black { border-style: solid; border-width: 2px; border-top-right-radius: 15px; min-height: auto; padding-top: 3rem; padding-bottom: 3rem; }

._23-round-box.four-sides._2.g-black-text { border-style: none solid solid; border-top-width: 0px; border-right-width: 2px; border-top-right-radius: 0px; min-height: auto; padding-top: 3%; padding-bottom: 3%; }
._23-round-box.four-sides._3.g-black-text { border-style: solid; border-top-width: 0px; border-bottom-left-radius: 0px; min-height: auto; padding-top: 3rem; padding-bottom: 3rem; }
._23-round-box.four-sides._4.g-black-text { border-style: solid; border-width: 0px 2px 2px; border-radius: 0px 0px 15px 15px; min-height: auto; padding-top: 3rem; padding-bottom: 3rem; }
.method-slide_contentbox { gap: 1rem; flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; }
.method-description_header { gap: 1rem; flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; }
.experience_titlebox { flex-flow: column; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start; }
.experience-awards-item_titlebox { flex-flow: column; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start; }

._23-container.is-menu { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); flex-direction: column; height: 75vh; min-height: 75vh; margin-left: 5%; margin-right: 5%; padding-top: 0%; padding-bottom: 0%; display: block; }
._23-primary-heading.xxxl { align-items: flex-end; margin-bottom: 10px; font-size: 62px; line-height: 72px; display: flex; }
._23-primary-heading.xxxl.white { flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; }
._23-nav-contents { flex-direction: row; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 5%; }
._23-nav-menu-links { height: 100vh; padding-top: 3%; padding-bottom: 0px; display: block; position: fixed; inset: 0%; overflow: hidden; }
._23-nav-menu-links-items { row-gap: 4px; margin-right: 0%; display: flex; position: static; }
._23-menu-open-contents { row-gap: 18px; justify-content: flex-start; height: auto; margin-top: 0%; margin-bottom: 0%; padding-bottom: 0%; display: flex; }
._23-menu-footer-links-and-infos-holder { flex: 1 1 0%; grid-template-columns: 1fr; align-content: start; align-items: start; margin-top: 0%; padding-bottom: 0%; }
._23-boxes { gap: 16px; flex-direction: row; grid-template-rows: auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; display: none; }
._23-boxes.two-sides.is-portfolio { gap: 0px; grid-template-rows: auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; display: grid; }
._23-round-box.dark.is-menu { flex-direction: column; min-width: auto; min-height: auto; }
._23-round-box.four-sides._1.g-black { border-style: solid; border-width: 2px; border-top-right-radius: 15px; min-height: auto; padding-top: 3rem; padding-bottom: 3rem; }
._23-round-box.four-sides._2.g-black-text { border-style: none solid solid; border-top-width: 2px; border-top-right-radius: 0px; min-height: auto; padding-top: 3rem; padding-bottom: 3rem; }
._23-round-box.four-sides._3.g-black-text { border-width: 0px 2px 2px; border-bottom-left-radius: 0px; min-height: auto; padding-top: 3rem; padding-bottom: 3rem; }
._23-round-box.four-sides._4.g-black-text { border-style: solid; border-width: 0px 2px 2px; border-bottom-left-radius: 15px; min-height: auto; padding-bottom: 3rem; }
._23-two-side-buttons { row-gap: 12px; flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; margin-top: 25px; }
._23-services-bloc.branding { border-radius: 22px; justify-content: center; align-items: center; display: block; bottom: 60px; }
._23-description-of-services { flex-flow: column; grid-template-rows: auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr; display: flex; }
._23-description-intern { row-gap: 20px; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-start; width: auto; margin-bottom: 10%; }
._23-current-project-link { object-fit: fill; border-radius: 10px; width: auto; height: auto; overflow: hidden; }
._23-current-cover-image-portfolio { object-fit: cover; border-radius: 15px; width: 100%; height: 100%; min-height: auto; max-height: none; overflow: visible; }
._23-inner-segmented-portfolio-category { white-space: pre-wrap; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; }
._23-portfolio-left-side { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; width: auto; max-width: none; margin-right: 0%; display: flex; }
._20-filter-category.bigger { text-align: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 6px; margin-right: 0px; }
._23-portfolio-filter-form { column-gap: 6px; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; margin-left: -5%; margin-right: -5%; padding-left: 5%; padding-right: 5%; overflow: auto; }
._23-nav_pill-wrapper { width: 100vw; padding-left: 5px; padding-right: 5px; inset: 0% auto auto 0%; }
.clients-wrapper { gap: 40px; grid-template-rows: auto auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; place-items: center; display: grid; }
._23-portfolio-project-link_list-mobile { object-fit: cover; border-radius: 12px; margin-top: 10px; display: block; }
._23-hero-about-video { border: 1px solid rgb(0, 0, 0); border-bottom-right-radius: 25px; border-bottom-left-radius: 25px; height: auto; }
.clients-about-wrapper { gap: 40px; margin-top: 0px; padding-top: 10px; padding-bottom: 10px; padding-left: 40px; overflow: hidden; }
._24-current-project-link { object-fit: fill; border-radius: 10px; width: auto; height: 280px; min-height: auto; overflow: hidden; }
._24-current-cover-image-portfolio { object-fit: cover; border-radius: 15px; width: 100%; height: 100%; min-height: auto; max-height: none; overflow: visible; }
._24-entregas-wrapper { gap: 60px; flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; }
._24-marcas-services-wrapper { gap: 60px; flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; }

._26-container.is-menu { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); flex-direction: column; height: 75vh; min-height: 75vh; margin-left: 5%; margin-right: 5%; padding-top: 0%; padding-bottom: 0%; display: block; }
.site-header-cases-item_labelbox { gap: 0.5rem; flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; }
.site-header-clients_list { gap: 1rem; grid-template-rows: auto auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; display: grid; }
.arguments-section_bottom { flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; }
.experience-awards_item { gap: 2rem; flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; }
.experience-awards_info { gap: 0.5rem; flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; }

._25__nav__links { background-color: var(--_rebranding--2026---neutral-900); border-radius: 0.6rem; flex-flow: column; flex: 0 1 auto; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: stretch; width: 88%; margin-right: 6vw; display: flex; inset: 0% 0% auto auto; box-shadow: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.41) 0px 0px 40px inset; }
._25__nav__link { color: var(--_rebranding--2026---neutral-300); flex: 0 1 auto; padding-top: 0.9rem; padding-bottom: 0.9rem; display: block; }
._25__hero-section__h1 { text-align: center; letter-spacing: -0.06rem; max-width: none; font-size: 8vw; }
._25__hero-section__txt-wrapper { justify-content: center; align-items: center; max-width: none; }
._25__services-section__tabs-menu__item { justify-content: center; align-items: center; padding-bottom: 1rem; display: flex; }
._25__method-section__content { gap: 1.2rem; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; height: auto; padding-top: 1.5rem; padding-bottom: 3.5rem; position: relative; }

._25__footer__links { gap: 4.5rem; grid-template-rows: auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; margin-top: 10%; margin-bottom: 10%; padding-left: 3vw; padding-right: 3vw; display: grid; }
